prompt:
A compact aquarium liquid reagent test kit arranged neatly on a lab bench, with four small reagent bottles, two clear test tubes, color comparison cards, and a few drops of tinted liquid in the tubes. The setup clearly communicates water chemistry testing for ammonia, nitrite, and nitrate, with caps, tray inserts, and pipette-style handling details visible. A blurred aquarium in the background adds context without distracting from the kit itself.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future aquatics-lab aesthetic: soft natural lighting, crisp glass reflections, realistic plastic and liquid textures, no logos, no readable chart text, and no identifiable faces. The composition should feel practical and reassuring, centered on the reagent kit so it reads instantly as a water-testing inventory item for DSPACE.
